notes: Maker of VidModem signal processing technology. Aberdeen evaluated positively May 1997. Company appears to have not survived the late 1990s; IP video displaced the analog FM approach.
Cited as telephone carrier lined up behind VidModem as means of promoting ATM service. AT&T's ATM buildout was slow; VidModem dependency on carrier ATM proved a risk factor.
Author of impact report. Patricia Borns was the analyst.
Aberdeen references AT&T's 1960 New York World's Fair videophone demonstration as starting point for industry struggle to deliver video phone. Provides historical context.
